raw_calls.callee: (() => { const liveCard = activeCards.find(c => c.id === editCard.id) || editCard; return <EditCardModal card={liveCard} cardComments={comments[liveCard.id]||[]} user={user} onSave={updateCard} onDelete={softDeleteCard} onClose={() => setEditCard(null)} onAddComment={addComment} allCards={activeCards} onAddSticker={(parentId, data) => addSticker(liveCard.id, parentId, data)} onUpdateSticker={(stickerId, status) => updateStickerStatus(liveCard.id, stickerId, status)} />; })
